---
title: "Preference analysis<br>with conjoints"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [simple, ../../css/slide-styles.scss, brand]
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    auto-stretch: false

    preview-links: true
    code-block-height: 730px
    controls: auto

    title-slide-attributes: 
      data-background-image: ../../img/background-hex-shapes.svg
      data-background-opacity: "0.5"
      data-background-gradient: "linear-gradient(30deg, {{< brand color green >}}, {{< brand color cyan >}})"

    include-in-header: 
      - text: |
          <script>
            if (window.location.search.includes('decktape=true')) {
              document.documentElement.classList.add('decktape-export');
            }
          </script>
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(countdown)
```

# Preference analysis {background-color='{{< brand color orange >}}' background-image='../../img/background-hex-shapes.svg' background-opacity='0.5'}
